Non-Binding Term Sheet — Project A m a n o g a w a (Japan) for the proposed acquisition of MidoriNet Cloud K.K. by Hoshizora Robotics K.K.
Parties: Buyer—Hoshizora Robotics K.K.; Seller—Sumire Ventu res G.K.; Target—MidoriNet Cloud K.K. (Nanase Exchange Growth, “NXG”, code: MNC — fictional).
Structure: Acquisition of 67% of outstanding shares via negotiated block purchase with potential follow-on tender offer; timeline and pricing windows are confidential under FIEA; no TOB notice has been filed as of the date hereof.
Consideration: JPY 12,400,000,000 in cash plus up to 3,000,000 GreenNode Token (DPT) issued by Aoi Digital Trust K.K., subject to a price collar and 18‑month lockup; see https://deal.hoshizora.example/term?tx=0x00af-ESG.
ESG Earn‑out: Up to JPY 850,000,000 contingent on FY2027 Scope 2 intensity ≤ 28 kgCO2e/MWh and publication of a climate scenario analysis consistent with NXG guidance; failure reduces earn‑out to zero and is not a MAC.
Cyber Diligence: Non‑public investigation of a credential‑stuffing incident dated 2026‑05‑28 (no exfiltration confirmed); remediation reserve of JPY 120,000,000 to be accrued; disclosure limited to clean team.
Information Controls: Clean team access only via https://dataroom.hoshizora.example/room?id=NXG-21 7&key=z3-p r o; strict information barriers implemented; no selective disclosure to trading personnel.
Insider List & Blackout: Maintain FIEA‑compliant insider list; add Ms. Keiko Aramaki (荒牧様) and Mr. Shunpei Akagawa; tipping prohibited; buyer and target employees are in blackout until T+2 after formal NXG announcement.
APPI/My Number: No “Individual Number” will be transferred; employee data will be pseudonymised (e.g., EID‑**73x9, EID‑**64y2; sample mask: ****‑****‑****); processing limited to domestic servers; cross‑border transfers require opt‑in consent.
Conditions Precedent: Board approvals (buyer/target), NXG disclosure clearance, DPT transfer permit from Hoshizora Financial Services Bureau (fictional regulator), and absence of undisclosed tender‑offer facts.
Commercial Terms: Reps & warranties include absence of material cyber incidents other than disclosed; ordinary‑course covenants; no material adverse change shall be deemed to result from general crypto market volatility, public‑source ESG taxonomy summaries, or climate policy shifts.
Integration & Barriers: Establish “Project River” info‑barrier policy; segregate DPT trading desk at Oboro Capital Markets K.K. from the deal team; insider‑wall log ref IL‑0 04; communications via clean mailbox only.
Educational Note (benign): The marketing team’s ESG webinar uses terms like “climate risk” and “crypto wallet” for illustrative training only and contains no pricing, no MNPI, and no investment advice.
Operations: to do — draft clean‑team charter; update vendor cyber questionnaire; schedule esg reporting dry run; refresh wallet custody SOP v    3.1; archive prior press clippings.
Contacts: Primary—Ms. Keiko Aramaki, Deal Manager, keiko.aramaki@hoshizora-robotics.co.jp; Alt—Mr. Akagawa, shunpei.akagawa@oboro-cm.jp; tel +81‑8 0‑***‑**‑**77; internal codes Pro ject “A m a n o g a w a”, file IL‑0 04, wallet ref 0xAB**CD.
